tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Will / Shall.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Will / Shall का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I will come tomorrow. She will surely succeed. Shall I close the door? We will meet tomorrow. They will complete this project.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Will / Shall.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Will / Shall का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Shall we go? I will help you. He will come back soon. I will not break this promise. Will you call me?

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "हम इसे बेहतर बनाएंगे।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "We wills meet tomorrow."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Will / Shall.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Will / Shall का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I will finish this work tomorrow. Shall I start? They will never give up. I will surely try.
